name: Cheeze Sause Substitue
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Skim milk or soy milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the oil and flour in a bowl until well combined.
2. Gradually add the skim milk (or soy milk) while stirring continuously to form a paste.
3. Optionally, substitute with soy milk or a mixture of nut butter and water.
4. Stir in the nutritional yeast.
5. Season with salt, pepper, and mustard to taste.
6. Cook until the mixture thickens into a sauce-like consistency.
